prompt: A masculine sports fan room interior. A glossy aluminium metal wall art panel with a football club crest design on a blue background is prominently mounted on a dark navy accent wall. The room has a dark leather armchair, a side table with a beer and remote control, a large TV mounted nearby showing a football match. A team scarf draped over the chair arm. Warm ambient lighting from a table lamp. Premium man cave atmosphere. The metal art panel is the centrepiece catching warm light on its glossy surface. Interior lifestyle photography. 4K.
